name: purple_check
description: Purple-team control assurance for ONE confirmed finding (spec 21): re-issue the malicious PoC to see if it is now PREVENTED, probe any audit/event endpoint for DETECTION, then a purple-team LLM judges prevention/detection/response. System prompt injected from prompts/purple.md into task ref purple_check.

inputParameters.queryExpression: { finding: { title: .finding.title, category: .finding.category, poc_request: .finding.poc_request, evidence: ((.finding.evidence // "")[0:400]) }, detection_probe: { reissue_status: (.replay.response.status // .replay.error // null), reissue_summary: (.replay.summary // ""), blocked_signal: (if ((.replay.response.status // 0) | tostring | test("^(401|403|429)$")) then true else false end), refused: ((.replay.error // "") | test("refused")) } } | tojson

.raw as $r | (if ($r|type) == "object" then $r else (try ($r[ ($r|index("{")) : (($r|rindex("}"))+1) ] | fromjson) catch {prevented: "unknown", logged: "unknown", assessment: "purple output could not be parsed"}) end)
